THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOOTH, KEVIN DBA "2001 AUTOBODY" THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2001-2001-1/2 OAKDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $12,900.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,900.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-01-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, TOGETHER WITH ATTENDANT GARAGE, STORAGE AND COMMON AREAS.
